_comment: Canonical logical objects the Actuarial Workbench accelerator reasons over. Accelerator-owned and target-agnostic. The customer maps each of their physical tables onto one of these via ACCELERATOR_CORE_ELEMENTS.LOGICAL_OBJECT. Templates gate on presence: a REQUIRED object missing fails the readiness gate; an OPTIONAL object missing causes the dependent arm/join to be dropped (graceful degradation).

objects.label: Medical claim header
objects.powers: medical reserving spine: incurred (service) + PAID date for paid-development triangles, allowed/paid amounts, member attribution
objects.notes: The paid/processed date is what makes the medical triangle + actual-to-expected possible. If absent, reserving falls back to the completion-factor method.

objects.label: Medical claim line
objects.powers: service-category classification (via POS), line allowed/paid, utilization units
objects.notes: Line service date is the incurred date at category grain; paid date comes from the header.

objects.label: Pharmacy claim
objects.powers: pharmacy reserving + spend: fill (incurred) + paid dates, allowed/paid, reversals
objects.notes: Rx paid date is near-real-time; Rx triangle completes fast.

objects.label: Member eligibility month
objects.powers: PMPM denominator, LOB/segment attribution, Rx coverage flag
objects.notes: Drives every PMPM metric and the RAF exposure weighting.

objects.label: Valuation / analysis anchor
objects.powers: as-of valuation month, paid-through censoring, history/forecast horizons
objects.notes: A single anchor month + horizons. If absent, default to max(paid_date).

objects.label: Claim completion factor reference
objects.powers: completion-factor IBNR method + calibration/backtest of triangle development
objects.notes: Cumulative % complete by development lag, by benefit type (Medical/Pharmacy).

objects.label: Place-of-service reference
objects.notes: Classifies each medical line's setting for the experience exhibit and category triangles.

objects.label: Member enrollment
objects.powers: risk score (RAF) input, benefit/plan design, funding arrangement
objects.notes: Absent => RAF derived from cost-experience only; benefit/AV enrichments omitted.

objects.label: Plan trend / pricing assumption
objects.powers: priced medical/Rx trend, target MLR, target PMPM for the pricing build-up
objects.notes: Absent => projection-period trend is actuary-entered in the workbench.

objects.label: Drug rebate source
objects.grain: per NDC (table) OR a column on the claim

objects.label: Rebate accrual (book-level)
objects.powers: guaranteed/realized rebate offset in the Rx rate build-up

objects.label: Drug unit-price history
objects.powers: unit-cost component of Rx trend decomposition
objects.notes: Absent => Rx trend collapses to utilization + mix.

objects.label: Drug (NDC) reference master
objects.powers: specialty/generic/brand classification for Rx experience exhibit
objects.notes: Absent => Rx category defaults from claim flags where available.

objects.label: Procedure / revenue / DRG reference
objects.powers: richer medical service-category labels beyond POS setting
objects.notes: Optional label enrichment; POS setting is the required classifier.

objects.label: GL booked reserve balance
objects.powers: reserve roll-forward, booked-component split (case/IBNP/IBNR/LAE/PfAD), and Reserve-vs-GL tie-out
objects.notes: Independent Finance/GL feed (case reserves + LAE + margin are not in claims). Absent => tie-out omitted and case/LAE/PfAD fall back to actuary-entered assumptions.
